hero.title: Before & After School Programs
hero.subtitle: Safe, supervised care before and after the school day, plus enrichment classes through our After School Program.
morningStars.heading: 🌅 Morning Stars
morningStars.snacks: Morning Stars students receive the free school breakfast when the school day begins.
casper.heading: 🌇 CASPER After-Care
casper.notAvailable: Half days, teacher-parent conferences, or professional development days
assistance.body: Need financial assistance? Contact the Urban League at (201) 451-8888 or visit ulohc.org/programs/nj-cares-for-kids.
payment.body: Payment policy: Monthly payments apply with a 5-day grace period. Children cannot attend if their balance is unpaid by the 10th of the month.
apply.body: How to apply: see the JCBOE page on Morning STARS & CASPER for enrollment details.
asp.heading: After School Enrichment Program (ASP)
asp.lead: The PS5 ASP offers a wide range of enrichment classes at reduced cost, with scholarships available.
asp.cost: Reduced fee; scholarships available — contact the PTA for details.
